pageContext.name: Nosferatu
pageContext.description: Sideshow Art Prints presents the Nosferatu Skateboard Deck, featuring the horror illustration work of artist Timothy Pittides.  Inspired by the classic silent film Nosferatu, eine Symphonie des Grauens, Timothy Pittides' vision of the vampiric Count Orlok is a horrific sight to behold! In the artist's own tribute to the iconic work, the dreaded creature peers from the broken boards of his coffin as rats crawl around its surface. His piercing gaze and equally piercing fangs mesmerize and menace the viewer in this detailed black and white design.  Each Nosferatu Skateboard Deck is resin printed on a 7-ply Canadian Maple Street Deck measuring 8.25 wide and 32.5 long. Limited to a numbered edition of only 100 pieces ever produced, this enthralling board makes a unique, durable addition to your collection, suited for both practical use on the ramp and for proudly displaying on your wall.  Bring the horror home and add the Nosferatu Skateboard Deck by Timothy Pittides to your collection today!  Skate Deck details:   Original Art by Timothy Pittides Limited edition of 100 8.25 x 32.5 Street Deck Resin Print on 7-Ply Canadian Maple
